openBankingBanner.title: Open Banking is coming to Colombia
openBankingBanner.description: Decree 0368 of 2026 requires all banks to expose secure APIs. Rhynode will be one of the first to integrate.

openBankingCard.title: What is Open Banking?
openBankingCard.intro: Open Banking allows authorized apps to access your banking data securely, with your explicit permission. This means:
openBankingCard.bullet1: Your transactions import automatically with no manual entry
openBankingCard.bullet4: Your data is encrypted and never sold
openBankingCard.outroAfter: made Open Finance mandatory for all financial entities supervised by the SFC.

hero.badge: #1 finance app for individuals and SMBs in Colombia
hero.title: Save more, get paid faster and grow your net worth
hero.subtitle: Rhynode organizes your personal and business finances in Colombia. AI budgets, DIAN electronic invoicing, Wompi payments and tax reports you can actually understand.
hero.fineprint: No credit card required. Cancel anytime. Set up your account in less than 2 minutes.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 10,000 people and SMBs in Colombia trust Rhynode.

mfl.name: María Fernanda López
mfl.quote: I used to have no idea where my money went. Now my expenses are categorized and my taxes organized in one place.

car.name: Carlos Andrés Ramírez
car.quote: Electronic invoicing saves me hours every month. My clients get invoices automatically and DIAN is happy.

dt.name: Daniela Torres
dt.quote: I recommend Rhynode to my clients because it unites accounting and personal finance without them needing to be tech experts.

pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale when you need to. No contracts, no hidden fees.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For those who want to control their personal money.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: Personal finance with AI and advanced scenarios.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: DIAN invoicing, collections and team for SMBs.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about DIAN, security, payments and plans in Colombia.

accountant.a: No. Rhynode automates repetitive tasks and organizes your information so you or your accountant work faster and with fewer errors.

dian.q: Is the invoicing valid with DIAN?
dian.a: Yes. We generate electronic invoices with the structure DIAN requires and prepare the integration with authorized invoicing providers.

payments.q: Can I pay with Wompi, PSE or card?
payments.a: Yes. Paid plans are processed with Wompi, letting you pay with PSE, credit/debit cards and other methods available in Colombia.

personalOnly.q: Can I use it only for personal finance?
personalOnly.a: Of course. The Starter plan is free forever and you can use it without activating business features.

security.a: We use encryption in transit and at rest, secure authentication and never sell your information. You own your data.

price.q: How much does it cost and are there lock-in contracts?
price.a: The Starter plan is free. Growth and Scale are monthly with no lock-in contracts or hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

mobile.a: Yes. Rhynode is a PWA, so you can use it from your phone browser, add it to your home screen and receive notifications.

bank.q: How do I connect my bank?
bank.a: You can log transactions manually or connect accounts from Bancolombia, Davivienda, Nu, Nequi and other PSE/Wompi-compatible institutions.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your finances?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people and businesses in Colombia using Rhynode to grow with confidence.

footer.tagline: Personal finance and accounting intelligence for individuals and SMBs in Colombia.
